news.headline: Canada Q3 national net worth falls to 0.7% to C$18.95 trillion from C$19.08 trillion in Q2.
US PPI & Jobless Claims Higher Than Expected
Morien Resources Corp. provides corporate update on Dec. 12, 2024. TSX-V:MOX.
news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, on December 12, 2024, Morien Resources Corp. (referred to as "Morien" or the "Company") announced a corporate and project update for its shareholders and investors. The company trades on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol MOX.

news.headline: Wold Architects & Engineers survey shows Americans value mental health in public sector buildings, emphasizing the impact of thoughtful design.
news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, Wold Architects and Engineers, a prominent company in designing spaces for education, healthcare, and government sectors, released findings from a national survey on the impact of building design on mental health. The survey, conducted by Wakefield Research, highlights American sentiment towards community facilities and the belief that incorporating thoughtful design early on can greatly affect well-being. The survey sheds light on the significance people attribute to the influence of building design on mental health.

news.headline: Chung-Ang Univ study finds tRNA fragment 5'-tRNAGly(GCC) crucial in cancer gene expression, identified as a potential therapeutic target.
news.summary: A recent study conducted in Seoul has uncovered that a specific tRNA molecule, known as 5'-tRNAGly(GCC), plays a crucial role in regulating gene expression and could serve as a promising target for cancer therapeutics. These findings, revealed on December 12, 2024, highlight the significance of transfer RNA-derived fragments (tRFs) in various organisms. tRFs, including tRNA halves (tRHs), are produced under specific circumstances and have potential implications in cancer treatment strategies.

news.headline: All Y'alls Foods launches "IT'S BIG CRUNCHY CHEEZY BITS Y'ALL," revolutionizing cheese snacks. Plant-based, dairy/gluten free.
news.summary: In response to consumer demand, All Y'alls Foods has introduced a new product, IT'S BIG CRUNCHY CHEEZY BITS Y'ALL, catering to those looking for dairy and gluten-free cheese-flavored snacks. The launch took place in CROSSROADS, Texas on Dec. 12, 2024. This innovative addition is set to make waves in the plant-based market.

news.headline: RKD Group selected as fundraising agency for Feed the Children, aiming to utilize its multichannel approach.
news.summary: Announced on December 12, 2024, RKD Group has revealed its partnership with Feed the Children, a top anti-hunger organization. In this strategic move, RKD Group will serve as the direct response fundraising agency for Feed the Children. The collaboration aims to capitalize on RKD Group's advanced multichannel strategies, ensuring maximum reach and impact for fundraising efforts.

news.headline: Alabama Motor Express (AMX) partners with ParkPro to tackle US truck parking shortage by securing guaranteed hourly parking, creating a significant milestone.
news.summary: AMX has made history as the initial freight company to secure assured hourly parking through ParkPro, addressing the truck parking scarcity in the United States during the holiday period. The development took place in SARASOTA-MANATEE, Fla., on December 12, 2024. This achievement marks an important step in alleviating the challenges faced by truckers, especially in light of the increasing demand for transportation services. ParkPro, a well-known national provider of commercial truck parking solutions, played a pivotal role in making this landmark collaboration possible. This initiative is poised to benefit a significant number of truck drivers navigating through the demanding holiday season.

news.headline: Ray & Son Heating & Air Conditioning in GA offers Cool Cash Rebate for Carrier Infinity® Series Systems - 54 years in service.
news.summary: A long-standing heating and cooling service provider in South Georgia, Ray & Son Heating & Air Conditioning, has announced the launch of Carrier's Cool Cash Rebate program. With over 54 years of experience, the company is thrilled to offer this new program to homeowners in Valdosta, Thomasville, Tifton, and Moultrie. Through this initiative, residents can benefit from special rebates to enhance their heating and cooling systems.

news.headline: Bowlero rebrands as Lucky Strike Entertainment with NYSE ticker "LUCK".
news.summary: A well-known entertainment company, Bowlero Corporation, based in Richmond, Virginia, has undergone a rebranding process and is now known as Lucky Strike Entertainment. This change signifies a new chapter for the company as it moves forward under the new brand name.

news.headline: Prevounce Health launches Pylo 900-LTE BP monitor for pregnancy; FDA-cleared, clinically validated. Helps in gestational hypertension.
news.summary: A blood pressure monitor called Pylo 900-LTE has received clinical validation and FDA approval for monitoring blood pressure during pregnancy. This approval aims to combat the issue of gestational hypertension. The announcement was made in Indianapolis on Dec. 12, 2024. Prevounce Health, a trusted supplier of remote care management software, introduced this innovative device.

news.headline: Bascom Group buys 92 apartment units in Seattle's Belltown area.
news.summary: A real estate investment firm based in Irvine, California, known as Bascom Group, LLC, has purchased 2300 Elliott, a multifamily complex in Seattle, Washington, comprising 92 units. The city is recognized for its rapid urban development. The financing for the acquisition was arranged by Jamie Kline and Annie Rice from JLL. The transaction signifies an ongoing trend of rising interest in the real estate market in Seattle.

news.headline: CEO's AI leadership book becomes #1 bestseller as CEOs rush to master AI in 2025. Get AI-ready now to avoid falling behind.
news.summary: The CEO's recent AI Playbook issues a pressing alert: Organizations must prioritize becoming AI-ready promptly to avoid lagging behind in the dynamic business landscape. Generative AI is fundamentally reshaping the business landscape, necessitating immediate action from CEOs to stay competitive. Renowned CEO coach Chuck Bolton emphasized the need for swift adaptation to avoid being overtaken by competitors in the ever-evolving business environment. The message stresses the urgency for organizations to embrace AI technologies to stay relevant and competitive in the market.

news.headline: US short-term interest-rate futures pare earlier losses after economic data, as traders add to bets on Fed rate cuts next year.
Great Elm Capital Corp. raised $13.2M by issuing 1.1M shares at $12.06/share to Summit Grove Partners, LLC (SGP).
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on December 12, 2024, Great Elm Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: GECC), a business development company, shared that they have sold about 1.1 million shares of their common stock at a net asset value of $12.06 per share. The total price paid by Summit Grove Partners, LLC ("SGP") for this purchase is $13.2 million.

news.headline: Live Ventures reported financial results for fiscal year 2024 ending on September 30, 2024. Stock ticker: LIVE.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 12, 2024, Live Ventures Incorporated (Nasdaq: LIVE), a diversified holding company, reported its fiscal year results ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: DOE awards $3.4B contracts to LIS Technologies and NANO Nuclear Energy for uranium acquisition program.
news.summary: A contract has been awarded by the Department of Energy (DOE) to LIS Technologies (Laser Isotope Separation Technologies) as the prime contractor, with NANO Nuclear Energy as a key subcontractor. This contract allows them to access task orders with a minimum value of $2 million each. The aim is to advance their nuclear fuel production, enrichment, and related technologies and capabilities.

news.headline: Babylon Chain now holds a Bitcoin deposit worth $3.6 billion.
Mediterranean Aperitivo Project, by the E.U, tours the U.S to promote European Quality Products to food professionals.
news.summary: The Mediterranean Aperitivo, a cultural event for food and beverage professionals in the U.S., has gained significant traction. Launched three years ago, this campaign is supported by the E.U. to highlight European Quality Products. Taking place in New York on December 12, 2024, this initiative has been instrumental in showcasing the diversity and excellence of Mediterranean cuisines to a wide audience.

news.headline: NaaS Tech (Nasdaq: NAAS) receives '2' ESG rating from Sustainable Fitch, score rises to 78 from 76.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), a pioneering U.S.-based EV charging service company in China, revealed that Sustainable Fitch boosted its entity score to 78 from 76, affirming an ESG Entity Rating of '2' for the Company.

news.headline: Exo introduces AI enhancements for Exo Iris®, offering quantification of IVC collapsibility and myocardial wall thickness for quick health assessments.
news.summary: Exo, a renowned provider of accessible medical imaging solutions, headquartered in Santa Clara, California, introduced its newest advancements for Exo Iris® named SweepAI™. The latest features enable automated quantification of IVC collapsibility and myocardial wall thickness. This empowers healthcare professionals to swiftly access objective data crucial for evaluating fluid status and heart health. The incorporation of SweepAI-based IVC collapsibility analysis alongside Exo’s existing cardiac and lung AI tools allows providers to efficiently identify the underlying factors contributing to shortness of breath. The advancements promise accuracy and speed, delivering essential insights within seconds, aiding in enhanced patient care.

news.headline: PhaseV will present new causal machine learning method at ML4H Symposium, applicable in various treatment areas, for better patient outcomes.
news.summary: A groundbreaking technique that can be utilized across various medical fields and stages of clinical trials has the potential to enhance precision medicine and ultimately boost patient results. On December 12, 2024, PhaseV, a leader in utilizing software and machine learning (ML) to optimize clinical trials, revealed a new method that could revolutionize the industry. This development aims to improve patient outcomes and advance the field of precision medicine, providing considerable benefits in terms of treatment effectiveness and individualized care.

news.headline: XChange Place offers exclusive investment opportunity in early cancer detection tech firm, available to accredited investors.
news.summary: A cutting-edge digital marketplace for alternative investments has introduced a unique limited-time opportunity for accredited investors. The TechBio company, supported by top-tier venture capital and cancer research specialists, is now accessible solely to accredited investors through an innovative platform.

news.headline: Constellium and Renault Group complete R&D project "ISA3" to advance aluminum solutions for lighter vehicles and closed-loop recycling. Set new standards for eco-friendly automotive design, supported by France Relance program.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Constellium SE (NYSE: CSTM) revealed the completion of the "ISA3" R&D initiative, which started in 2021 aiming to improve lightweighting in automotive design. This project, done in collaboration with Renault Group, ESI Group, the Institut de Soudure, and the University of Lorraine, and funded by a grant from the France Relance investment program, has established a standard for creating advanced aluminum automotive parts that are light, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly.

news.headline: VIVER luxury watch platform hits KRW 100 billion in sales, 16,000 products, and expands to global market with English support.
news.summary: VIVER has achieved over KRW 100 billion in cumulative sales and boasts a portfolio of 16,000 registered products. The company has expanded its services by introducing global transaction services, incorporating support for English and foreign currencies. This move comes following their success in growing their domestic business and aims to cater to the international market by offering locally optimized solutions.

news.headline: FDA approves Impella heart pumps for pediatric patients with ADHF and cardiogenic shock, aiding many in need. (excluding date and location)
news.summary: Two novel left-sided, minimally invasive temporary mechanical circulatory support options, Impella 5.5 and Impella CP, are now available for pediatric patients suffering from symptomatic acute decompensated heart failure and cardiogenic shock. Distinguished as the initial of their kind, these devices provide a new treatment avenue for numerous patients in need. The cutting-edge medical advancements were brought forth in DANVERS, Mass., announced on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Zymeworks expands into autoimmune and inflammatory diseases during R&D Day. Focus on oncology too. Dec 12, 2024. Nasdaq: ZYME.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Zymeworks Inc. (Nasdaq: ZYME) disclosed key information from its Research and Development (R&D) Day on December 12, 2024. Zymeworks is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on creating innovative biotherapeutics to enhance treatment options for challenging illnesses. The company presented updates on its internal pipeline projects and its exploration of hematological cancers and autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. With a commitment to advancing healthcare, Zymeworks aims to address unmet medical needs through its diversified range of therapeutic solutions.

news.headline: Americans preparing for unexpected financial events in 2025 with a financial plan, as per Fidelity's study. 65% considering financial resolutions; 33% having a plan.
news.summary: In a recent study by Fidelity Investments®, it was revealed that in 2025, a large portion of Americans are focusing on practicality in their financial resolutions for the upcoming year. With the lingering effects of inflation and the increasing cost of living from the previous year, the majority of Americans are taking a sensible approach towards their finances for 2025. Approximately 65% of individuals are contemplating a financial resolution moving forward. This study, carried out over 16 years, indicates that a significant 33% of participants are prioritizing financial planning for the year.

news.headline: Abits Group Inc released results of 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders in Hong Kong on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Hong Kong, Abits Group Inc (NASDAQ: ABTS), a digital data center operator focused on bitcoin self-mining, shared the outcomes of its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

news.headline: Marriott acquires Postcard Cabins brand, previously Getaway, a pioneer in outdoor hospitality. New chapter for outdoor accommodations.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Brooklyn, New York, it was announced that the renowned Postcard Cabins brand, previously known as Getaway and an innovator in outdoor hospitality, has become part of the Marriott International portfolio. This move signifies a significant development in the outdoor accommodations sector.

news.headline: MultiPlan launches CompleteVue™, a Pricing Analytics Solution for healthcare providers, using publicly available data for market insights.
news.summary: In New York, MultiPlan Corporation (NYSE: MPLN) introduced CompleteVueTM, a new software platform. The platform utilizes publicly accessible price transparency data to offer advanced analytics for health systems and providers in the U.S. healthcare industry. MultiPlan focuses on providing data-driven cost management solutions to enhance transparency, fairness, quality, and affordability within the sector. This innovative platform aims to equip users with insights into the healthcare market, aligning with the company's commitment to promoting transparency and efficiency.

news.headline: Jet.AI starts pre-sales of Cessna Citation CJ4 Gen2 fractional ownership program, after initial order with Textron Aviation.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 12, 2024, Jet.AI Inc. (NASDAQ: JTAI), a company specializing in private aviation and artificial intelligence, revealed that they have started pre-sales for ownership shares in their new Cessna Citation CJ4 Gen2 plane. This announcement comes after their recent order of CJ4 aircraft from Textron Aviation Inc. on November 22, 2024.

news.headline: Legible debuts holiday cookbook by Cristina Ferrare & revamped A Christmas Carol AI for festive season.
news.summary: Legible is thrilled to introduce two exciting new releases perfect for the holiday season. First, we have unveiled a delightful holiday cookbook authored by Cristina Ferrare. Packed with delicious recipes and festive ideas, this cookbook is a must-have for the season. Additionally, we are launching an updated version of our popular A Christmas Carol AI. This enhanced version promises an even more immersive and magical experience for readers. Get ready to indulge in the holiday spirit with these new offerings from Legible.

news.headline: Warner Bros. Discovery restructures with two divisions - Global Linear Networks and Streaming & Studios. Nasdaq: WBD.
news.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. has announced a strategic reorganization into two key divisions: Global Linear Networks and Streaming & Studios. This move aims to enhance value creation opportunities for both segments. On December 12, 2024, the company issued this statement in New York. The Company will trade under the ticker symbol Nasdaq: WBD.

news.headline: TTEC reveals CX trends for 2025, leading global CX innovator. Top 5 trends highlighted.
news.summary: In Denver on December 12, 2024, TTEC Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEC), known for its AI-enhanced CX solutions through TTEC Engage and TTEC Digital, announced the identification of the top five trends influencing CX in 2025. This leading global CX technology and services innovator shared insights on the future of customer experience, highlighting key developments affecting the industry in the upcoming year.

news.headline: NAHD announces acquisition of Machfu Inc., entering Industrial IoT market.
news.summary: A company has recently made a strategic move into the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) sector by acquiring Machfu. This acquisition marks their entry into the rapidly growing IIoT market, which is projected to reach a value of $923.27 billion by 2025. The acquisition of Machfu, a prominent player in the IIoT space, is seen as a significant step towards strengthening the company's presence in the industry. This move exemplifies the company's commitment to capitalizing on the opportunities presented by the digital transformation of industrial operations. With Machfu's expertise and technology now part of their portfolio, the company is well-positioned to offer innovative IIoT solutions to meet the evolving needs of industrial clients.

news.headline: Bloomreach launches new self-service features to speed up partner integrations with AI tools.
news.summary: A technology company based in Mountainview, California, recently unveiled a series of tailored features for partners to enhance the speed of integrations with its advanced AI search and merchandising solutions. With this announcement, Bloomreach aims to streamline collaborations and drive efficiency in accessing its cutting-edge tools.

news.headline: PodcastOne (PODC) now offers 194 shows, surpassing 3.8 billion downloads with 5 new additions.
news.summary: Five new podcasts have been added to PodcastOne's network, bringing the total number of shows to 194. The network has also recently exceeded 3.8 billion downloads of its programming.

news.headline: Marriott partners with outdoor leaders to create outdoor collection by 2025. Deals signed on Dec. 12, 2024. #MarriottOutdoor
news.summary: A corporation based in Bethesda, Maryland, Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR), has finalized partnership agreements with two significant entities in the outdoor sector to elevate their experiential travel options. The company plans to introduce a specialized collection centered on outdoor activities in the year 2025. The official announcement was made on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: McHenry County (IL) State's Attorney's Office adopts NICE Justice AI-Powered Evidence Management, aiming for more efficiency.
news.summary: In Hoboken, NJ, NICE (Nasdaq: NICE) revealed that the McHenry County State's Attorney's Office in Illinois will implement NICE Justice digital evidence management from the Evidencentral platform. This AI-powered solution is set to enhance the criminal justice system efficiency. By utilizing NICE Justice, the McHenry County State's Attorney's Office seeks to collaborate better with law enforcement to deliver justice for victims. The initiative is part of efforts to streamline operations and improve outcomes for all involved parties.

news.headline: ABI Research's Trend Report finds 53 tech trends coming in 2025, with 48 that won't happen, including AI-RAN, smart glasses, humanoids, and onshoring of semiconductors.
news.summary: ABI Research's 5th annual Trend Report has pinpointed 53 crucial technology trends that are projected to materialize, along with 48 that are unlikely to come to fruition by the year 2025. The report, released in New York on December 12, 2024, highlights the anticipated technological advancements set to shape the upcoming year.

news.headline: Allogene Therapeutics board member David Bonderman passes away at 82, company announced.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, Allogene Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLO), recognized the loss of their founding board member, David Bonderman, who passed away at 82 years old in the company of his family. Allogene specializes in developing allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T™) products for cancer and autoimmune disease research.

news.headline: Gevo and LG Chem extend agreement for bio-propylene, accelerating commercialization using Gevo's ethanol-to-olefins tech.
news.summary: The latest commitment from both parties aims to expedite the commercialization efforts, surpassing the initial timeline for scaling up.

news.headline: Renova Technology broadens surveillance repair services, now offering hundreds of new models for 2024, aiming to support municipalities nationwide.
news.summary: Renova Technology, headquartered in Norcross, Georgia, revealed their latest update on December 12, 2024. The company, known for offering repair services to top manufacturers, integrators, and businesses, disclosed a significant enlargement to their enterprise surveillance repair options. They have introduced an impressive array of hundreds of new models as part of their 2024 expansion strategy.

news.headline: AAFES utilizes Manhattan's GenAI Chatbot for improved customer service. Deployment of Manhattan Active® Maven enables faster, more personalized service.
news.summary: In Atlanta, it has been reported that AAFES has recently implemented Manhattan Active® Maven, a move aimed at enhancing customer service. The introduction of this technology is expected to offer faster, personalized, and more precise service to customers.

news.headline: Canyon Partners raises $1.2B for real estate debt strategy. Fund named CRED III.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas, it was shared that Canyon Partners Real Estate LLC has successfully completed the final close of the Canyon US Real Estate Debt Fund III, known as "CRED III". This fund focuses on real estate credit investments and has amassed around __(specific amount)__ in total.

news.headline: Coherent Corp. considers alternate options for its SHARP™ technology to recycle metals from LiBs.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Pittsburgh-based Coherent Corp. revealed plans to assess strategic options for its Streamlined Hydrometallurgical Advanced Recycling Process (SHARP™) technology. This technology aims to recover and recycle essential metals from lithium-ion batteries. Coherent Corp., a prominent figure in materials, networking, and laser industries, is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol COHR. The decision to explore alternatives for SHARP™ comes as part of the company's ongoing strategic portfolio evaluation.

news.headline: Bobbie cuts prices by 15% on Organic Infant Formula, aims to tackle rising costs for families nationwide.
news.summary: In Heath, Ohio, Bobbie, a mom-founded infant nutrition company, has revealed a significant initiative to decrease prices by 15% for its classic Organic Infant Formula. This reduction applies to purchases made online, as well as at all Target and Whole Foods stores across the United States. The company's decision to lower prices is aimed at assisting families grappling with the escalating expenses of daily life. This reduction became feasible one and a half years subsequent to their acquisition of a U.S. manufacturing site, enabling them to cut costs and pass on the savings to consumers.

news.headline: Grit Pile Kidz releases Komo's Grit Engine book inspired by Mike Komisarek, promoting passion and support. Initiates Grit Gives Back.
news.summary: A heartwarming tale showcases the impact of personal drive and the crucial roles of supportive parents and mentors in achieving success. An organization introduces a new program called Grit Gives Back, aimed at empowering children to uncover their passions and develop self-assurance.

news.headline: Intevac (Nasdaq: IVAC) expects $70-72M year-end cash, 2025 revenue to strengthen profitability with dividends and strategic options.
news.summary: Intevac, Inc. shared key updates today, revealing its strong financial standing and future plans. By the end of this year, the company foresees a substantial cash position of approximately $70-$72 million, including restricted cash and investments. Looking ahead to 2025, Intevac anticipates revenue in the range of $____-$____ million. Additionally, the company is set to initiate quarterly dividends, implement further restructuring efforts to enhance profitability, and will concentrate on exploring strategic opportunities to fuel growth.
